mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ID, VERSION_NAME, VERSION_CODE, LINK_ADDRESS, FILE_ID, RELEASE_STATE, VERSION_TYPE, REMARK FROM SYS_VERSION_CONTROL WHERE RELEASE_STATE = '1' AND VERSION_TYPE = #{versionType} ORDER BY VERSION_CODE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ID, VERSION_NAME, VERSION_CODE, LINK_ADDRESS, FILE_ID, RELEASE_STATE, VERSION_TYPE, REMARK FROM SYS_VERSION_CONTROL WHERE RELEASE_STATE = '1' AND VERSION_TYPE = #{versionType} ORDER BY VERSION_CODE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT ID, BUSINESS_TYPE, FILE_BUCKET, FILE_PATH, FILE_SAVE_NAME, FILE_NAME, FILE_ICON, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM SYS_FILE WHERE ID = #{id}

SELECT ID, VERSION_NAME, VERSION_CODE, LINK_ADDRESS, FILE_ID, RELEASE_STATE, VERSION_TYPE, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM SYS_VERSION_CONTROL
ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_VERSION_CONTROL( ID, VERSION_NAME, VERSION_CODE, LINK_ADDRESS, FILE_ID, RELEASE_STATE, VERSION_TYPE, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id}, #{versionName}, #{versionCode}, #{linkAddress}, #{fileId}, #{releaseState}, #{versionType}, #{remark}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now} )
mapper.update: UPDATE SYS_VERSION_CONTROL SET VERSION_NAME = #{versionName}, VERSION_CODE = #{versionCode}, LINK_ADDRESS = #{linkAddress}, FILE_ID = #{fileId}, RELEASE_STATE = #{releaseState}, VERSION_TYPE = #{versionType}, REMARK = #{remark}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{id}
UPDATE SYS_VERSION_CONTROL SET RELEASE_STATE = #{releaseState}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{id}
